# MIDAS Summer Academy: Student Materials

Notebooks and data files for the MIDAS Summer Academy workshop.

**Do not edit files here.** Open the notebooks through the links posted in
Canvas, which launch them in Google Colab. To keep your work, use
**File > Save a copy in Drive** inside Colab.

This repository is generated automatically from the instructor development
repository. Any changes made here will be overwritten by the next sync.
